text.message: Don’t give it to him too easy
We had a conversation about this
Yeah idk why Black has it out for me
Cuz you have all 5 resources and you’re gonna win
It takes 1 pt from winning for Black to realize
Players like that that make me not like this game
You have to say thx to red
Im in last place and u targeted me
If you are in the last place is because u played bad
Ha or bc u were robbing the wrong person all game
